ddls:
CREATE TABLE "forest_sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forest site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the forest site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the forest site */,
  "total_trees" INTEGER /* Total number of trees in the forest site */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the forest site in square kilometers */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the forest site */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the forest site */,
  "terrain_type" TEXT /* Terrain type of the forest site */,
  "ecosystem_type" TEXT /* Ecosystem type of the forest site */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date when the forest site was created */,
  "modified_on" TEXT /* Date when the forest site was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forest_site_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forest site the image belongs to */,
  "image_file" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "image_caption" TEXT /* Caption for the image */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date when the image was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forest_site_images_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES forest_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "culling_operations" (
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each culling operation */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forest site where the culling operation was performed */,
  "operation_time" INTEGER /* Time of the culling operation (e.g., month, year) */,
  "estimated_trees" INTEGER /* Estimated number of trees to be culled */,
  "actual_trees" INTEGER /* Actual number of trees culled */,
  "cull_cost" REAL /* Cost of the culling operation per tree */,
  "cull_count" INTEGER /* Total number of trees culled */,
  "user_budget" REAL /* Budget allocated by the user for the culling operation */,
  "crew_size" INTEGER /* Size of the crew performing the culling operation */,
  "equipment_used" TEXT /* List of equipment used during the culling operation */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the culling operation */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date when the culling operation was created */,
  "modified_on" TEXT /* Date when the culling operation was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_culling_operations_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES forest_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "culling_operation_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the culling operation the image belongs to */,
  "image_file" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "image_caption" TEXT /* Caption for the image */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date when the image was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_culling_operation_images_operation_id FOREIGN KEY ("operation_id") REFERENCES culling_operations ("operation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., forest manager, financial analyst, executive) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date when the user was created */,
  "modified_on" TEXT /* Date when the user was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date when the group was created */,
  "modified_on" TEXT /* Date when the group was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_group_memberships" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date when the membership was created */,
  "modified_on" TEXT /* Date when the membership was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_group_memberships_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES user_groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_group_memberships_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "culling_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each culling report */,
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the culling operation the report is based on */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the culling operation */,
  "budget_spent" REAL /* Amount of budget spent on the culling operation */,
  "remaining_budget" REAL /* Remaining budget after the culling operation */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "modified_on" TEXT /* Date when the report was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_culling_reports_operation_id FOREIGN KEY ("operation_id") REFERENCES culling_operations ("operation_id")
)
